privileged_info_summary: The HVAC Index Creation task uses a synthetically-generated document with the title 'AirMax 5000 Series Commercial Rooftop Unit'. The input document at /home/ga/Documents/hvac_service_manual.docx contains exactly 6 required section headings (System Overview, Installation Procedures, Preventive Maintenance, Troubleshooting Guide, Component Specifications, Safety Procedures) and all 10 required technical terms (Compressor, Condenser coil, Evaporator coil, Refrigerant, Thermostat, Blower motor, Expansion valve, Economizer, Heat exchanger, Capacitor) distributed throughout the content. The document is programmatically created during task setup using python-docx, not sourced from an external dataset. The agent must mark these 10 terms as Index Entries, create an Index section at the document end, and save as /home/ga/Documents/hvac_manual_indexed.docx.
